rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9; rules-1 amendment seq 1 precedent): the PINNED-AT-INPUTS harness_manifest placeholder resolved to the staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/rules-1/modal/modal_rules1.py --print-manifest (40 staged files) for the rules-1-b FIXED runner bytes (direction-explicit answer cue, aligned ground-(iii) feedback, --pilot-n instrument-pilot mode, --cells ARM:SEED disjoint-slice filter for the parallel 4-account launch; f2bt scorer/sampler bytes unchanged). The staged set INCLUDES poc/rules-1/inputs/rules1-manifest.json, which pins the model revisions R1=SmolLM2-135M-Instruct@12fd25f77366fa6b3b4b768ec3050bf629380bac and R3=SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct@31b70e2e869a7173562077fd711b654946d38674 (cited from the FROZEN f2b-replicate/f2b-transfer pins.model_revisions carriers); as in rules-1, pins.model_revisions is a descriptive dict (not a bare-hex placeholder) and is pinned transitively via this harness_manifest over rules1-manifest.json + the in-container staged-bytes assert (fail-closed ERR_STAGING_MISMATCH). Certificate precondition e0071e9e already pinned; launcher --dry-plan OK vs caps (expected $4.88 / worst $6.83 w/ overhead vs usd_cap $10, gpu_hours OK); host-validity pilot: A1+A7 CPU pilot (pilot-20260712-cpu) + A5 Modal-A10G pilot via modal_rules1_pilot.py (same staged bytes, manifest sha asserted equal in-container). One-shot: any poc/rules-1 staged-byte change before the run invalidates this value.
